_meta.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Full Match Records
_meta._lineup_format: Array of strings: ['1. GK - Name', '2. RB - Name', ...]

first_cardless_match.description: First match of the tournament without a yellow or red card

A3.label: Thu 18 Jun
A3.notes: Coaches: Javier Aguirre (Mexico), Myung Bo Hong (South Korea). Line-ups confirmed. Luis Romo (50'). Full time: Mexico 1-0 South Korea.

A4.label: Thu 18 Jun
A4.notes: Coaches: Miroslav Koubek (Czech Republic), Hugo Broos (South Africa). Line-ups confirmed. Teboho Mokoena penalty (83') — handball by Pavel Šulc (81') after Thapelo Maseko shot blocked (assist Teboho Mokoena). Full time: Czech Republic 1-1 South Africa.

B1.label: Fri 12 Jun
B1.notes: Additional time: 6 minutes (second half). Full time 1-1.

B2.label: Fri 12 Jun
B2.notes: Coaches: Murat Yakin (Switzerland), Julen Lopetegui (Qatar). Full time: Switzerland 1-1 Qatar.

B3.label: Thu 18 Jun
B3.notes: Coaches: Jesse Marsch (Canada), Julen Lopetegui (Qatar). Line-ups confirmed. Homam Al-Amin red card (33') after foul (31'); VAR — no penalty to Canada. Assim Madibo red card (53') after VAR review — card upgraded; foul on Ismaël Koné (51'), injury delay. Mohammad Naceur Al Mannai own goal (75') after corner (73', conceded Mohialdin). Jonathan David hat-trick (29', 45+3', 90+2'). Full time: Canada 6-0 Qatar.

B4.label: Thu 18 Jun
B4.notes: Coaches: Murat Yakin (Switzerland), Sergej Barbarez (Bosnia-Herzegovina). Line-ups confirmed. Granit Xhaka penalty (90+7') — foul on Djibril Sow by Amar Memić (90+6'). Full time: Switzerland 4-1 Bosnia-Herzegovina.

C1.label: Sat 13 Jun
C1.notes: Coaches: Carlo Ancelotti (Brazil), Mohamed Ouahbi (Morocco). Neymar (Brazil) — injured (calf), did not travel. Full time: Brazil 1-1 Morocco.

C2.label: Sat 14 Jun
C2.notes: Coaches: Sébastien Migné (Haiti), Steve Clarke (Scotland). Full time: Haiti 0-1 Scotland.

C3.label: Sat 20 Jun
C3.notes: Coaches: Carlo Ancelotti (Brazil), Sébastien Migné (Haiti). Line-ups confirmed. Matheus Cunha brace (23', 36'); Vinícius Júnior (45+3'). Full time: Brazil 3-0 Haiti.

C4.label: Fri 19 Jun
C4.notes: Coaches: Mohamed Ouahbi (Morocco), Steve Clarke (Scotland). Line-ups confirmed. Ismaël Saibari (2', assist Brahim Díaz). Full time: Morocco 1-0 Scotland.

D1.label: Sat 13 Jun
D1.notes: Coaches: Mauricio Pochettino (USA), Gustavo Alfaro (Paraguay). Half time: USA 3-0. Full time: USA 4-1.

D2.label: Sun 14 Jun
D2.notes: Coaches: Tony Popovic (Australia), Vincenzo Montella (Türkiye). Full time: Australia 2-0 Türkiye.

D3.label: Fri 19 Jun
D3.notes: Coaches: Mauricio Pochettino (USA), Tony Popovic (Australia). Line-ups confirmed. Alex Freeman header (43') — set piece; goal awarded after VAR review. Full time: USA 2-0 Australia.

D4.label: Sat 20 Jun
D4.notes: Coaches: Gustavo Alfaro (Paraguay), Vincenzo Montella (Türkiye). Line-ups confirmed.

E1.label: Sun 14 Jun
E1.notes: Coaches: Julian Nagelsmann (Germany), Dick Advocaat (Curaçao). Livano Comenencia (21') — first goal in Curaçao World Cup history. Penalty: Riechedly Bazoer fouled Felix Nmecha (45+3). Half time: Germany 3-1. Additional time: 6 minutes (first half). Full time: Germany 7-1. No bookings — first cardless match of the tournament.

E2.label: Sun 14 Jun
E2.notes: Coaches: Emerse Faé (Ivory Coast), Sebastián Beccacece (Ecuador). Full time: Ivory Coast 1-0 Ecuador.

F1.label: Sun 14 Jun
F1.notes: Coaches: Ronald Koeman (Netherlands), Hajime Moriyasu (Japan). Half time: Netherlands 0-0 Japan. Full time: Netherlands 2-2 Japan.

F2.label: Sun 14 Jun
F2.notes: Coaches: Graham Potter (Sweden), Sabri Lamouchi (Tunisia). Additional time: 6 minutes (second half). Full time: Sweden 5-1 Tunisia.

G1.notes: Coaches: Rudi Garcia (Belgium), Hossam Hassan (Egypt). Full time: Belgium 1-1 Egypt.

G2.label: Mon 15 Jun
G2.notes: Coaches: Amir Ghalenoei (Iran), Darren Bazeley (New Zealand). Full time: Iran 2-2 New Zealand.

H1.notes: Coaches: Luis de la Fuente (Spain), Pedro Leitão Brito (Cape Verde). Cape Verde played 4-1-4-1. Full time: Spain 0-0 Cape Verde.

I1.notes: Coaches: Didier Deschamps (France), Pape Thiaw (Senegal). Additional time: 6 minutes (second half). Full time: France 3-1 Senegal.

I2.notes: Coaches: Graham Arnold (Iraq), Ståle Solbakken (Norway). Additional time: 6 minutes (second half). Full time: Iraq 1-4 Norway.

J1.label: Wed 17 Jun
J1.notes: Coaches: Lionel Scaloni (Argentina), Vladimir Petković (Algeria). Lionel Messi hat-trick (17', 60', 76'). Full time: Argentina 3-0 Algeria.

J2.label: Wed 17 Jun
J2.notes: Coaches: Ralf Rangnick (Austria), Jamal Sellami (Jordan). Jordan's first World Cup appearance. Ali Olwan (50') — Jordan's first ever World Cup goal. Yazan Al-Arab own goal (76'). Marko Arnautović penalty (90+12') after VAR — handball by Saleem Obaid. Full time: Austria 3-1 Jordan.

K1.label: Wed 17 Jun
K1.notes: Coaches: Roberto Martínez (Portugal), Sébastien Desabre (Congo DR). João Neves (6'), Yoane Wissa (45+5'). Full time: Portugal 1-1 Congo DR.

K2.label: Thu 18 Jun
K2.notes: Coaches: Fabio Cannavaro (Uzbekistan), Néstor Lorenzo (Colombia). Daniel Muñoz (40'). Abbosbek Fayzullaev (60') — Uzbekistan's first ever World Cup goal. Line-ups confirmed.

L1.label: Wed 17 Jun
L1.notes: Coaches: Thomas Tuchel (England), Zlatko Dalić (Croatia). Kane (12' pen, 42'), Baturina (36'), Musa (45+5'), Bellingham (47'), Rashford (85'). Full time: England 4-2 Croatia.

L2.label: Thu 18 Jun
L2.notes: Coaches: Carlos Queiroz (Ghana), Thomas Christiansen (Panama). Caleb Yirenkyi (90+5'). Full time: Ghana 1-0 Panama.
